message:
Improve search result formatting and relevance

Changes:
- Collapse newlines in snippets for readability
- Filter out poor matches (< 0% similarity)
- Show match percentage in header (not inline)
- Hide verbose summaries (> 300 chars)
- Show tool usage counts inline (when available)
- Cleaner visual hierarchy

Output now shows:
1. [project, date] - 92% match
   "single line snippet..."
   Tools: Read(3), Edit(2)
   path.jsonl:10-15

Much more scannable and useful for quick assessment.
